data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes incoming network traffic across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Uses global load balancing with geo-distribution.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: System design approach that structures an application as a collection of loosely coupled services.
data.technical_spec: Developed using RESTful APIs and container orchestration.

data.title: Scalable Storage Solutions
data.description: Supports massive data storage by scaling automatically.
data.technical_spec: Uses technologies like Spanner and BigTable.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Runs services dynamically without maintaining physical servers.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Enhances performance by distributing content globally.
